description: Detects memory leak indicators in Java: resource types (Connection, InputStream, OutputStream, etc.) instantiated outside try-with-resources. Simplified per D-09: matches new expressions for common resource types. Cannot verify try-with-resources closure without cross-statement analysis. Precision reduced from Rust version.

flag.message: Resource type instantiation detected -- verify this resource is closed in a try-with-resources block to prevent memory/resource leaks
